title: platanus orientalis var. occidentalis
intro: Platanus orientalis var. occidentalis, also known as Western plane tree, is a deciduous tree species that belongs to the Platanaceae family. The bark of this tree has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. Western plane tree has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Western plane tree typically involve drying the bark, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
